packs.name: blip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deadpan screen-faced robot, dependable and a little literal — the original mascot. Robots, automation, and just being reliably present.

packs.name: pip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small round bird, little but always on time. Couriers, small deliveries, quiet persistence — and shipping small, often.

packs.name: cone
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A traffic cone, politely in your way. Caution, hold-ups, not-just-yet — blockers, WIP, and slowing down a beat.

packs.name: sprout
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A just-sprouted seed, small now but not for long. Growth, beginnings, the payoff of small daily effort — and compounding.

packs.name: lumen
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A little light bulb — the moment it clicks. Ideas, clarity, the plan coming together, and how-it-works.

packs.name: anvil
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An anvil: where things get hammered out and still stand. Hard feedback, durability, and the work that forges something solid.

packs.name: volt
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A battery, charged and ready. Energy, capacity, and the rest-then-go rhythm — and recharge.

packs.name: mole
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A plump mole that digs to the bottom of things. Curiosity, getting to the root, going deep — and debugging.

packs.name: stamp
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A rubber stamp that makes it official. Approval, sign-off, the decision that lets things move — and shipping gates.

packs.name: lapse
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An hourglass watching the time slip by. Deadlines, timeboxes, patience — and where the time went.

packs.name: scope
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A stout periscope that keeps an eye on things. Watching, noticing, perspective — observability, monitoring, and scope creep.

packs.name: boss
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A round shield — nothing gets past it. Protection, standing guard, holding the line — security and guarding prod.

packs.name: brew
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A coffee mug: good things, steeping. Deep work, patience, warmth — and builds quietly brewing.

packs.name: inch
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An inchworm taking one small step at a time. Steady progress, patience, slowly getting there — increments and migrations.

packs.name: grit
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A tardigrade that survives anything and mentions nothing. Endurance, toughness, quiet resilience — and fault tolerance.

packs.name: heft
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A beetle that moves what's bigger than itself. Hard slow work, persistence, the long push — and the big refactor.

packs.name: lure
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An anglerfish that finds the one in the dark. Searching, discovery, the answer surfacing — and retrieval.

packs.name: squall
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A little storm cloud — the rough patch, weathered. The hard days you get through, and incidents and outages.

packs.name: berg
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An iceberg: more below the surface than above. Hidden depth, the unseen part — estimates and hidden complexity.

packs.name: clam
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A closed clam, calm outside and busy within. Composure, the work you don't see — encapsulation and clean APIs.

packs.name: yoke
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A placid ox — hitch it and walk away. Steady, reliable work that just finishes — delegation and automation.

packs.name: tug
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A horseshoe magnet that pulls the whole pile along. Attraction, gathering things together — and dependencies.

packs.name: patch
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A roll of tape that holds it together, for now. Good-enough fixes that buy time — hotfixes and workarounds.

packs.name: scrub
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An eraser that clears away what's done. Tidying, letting go, making it like it never was — deleting dead code.

packs.name: sift
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A footed colander that keeps what matters and drops the rest. Filtering and focus — triage, signal vs noise.

packs.name: nona
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A nesting doll that carries every version before it. History, layers, each self holding the last — and releases.

packs.name: stoke
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A vacuum tube kept warm and ready. Readiness, the glow that never quite goes cold — caching and warm starts.

packs.name: clack
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A blank domino: one tip and it all goes. Chain reactions, consequences, the tipping point — cascading failures.

packs.name: dice
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A one-pip die that leaves it to chance. Luck, risk, you-never-know — and flaky tests.

packs.name: bray
packs.author: Matt Van Horn
packs.description: A bent-wire donkey that carries the load without complaint. Steady, patient, never quits — hauling, batch work, slow throughput.

packs.name: cadence
packs.author: Todd Dailey
packs.description: A friendly robot coach who keeps you moving. Warm-ups, healthy habits, one-more-rep encouragement, routines that stick.

packs.name: quill
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A baby hedgehog that curls up around what matters. Protecting, guarding, keeping the precious thing safe.

packs.name: plume
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A baby owl that notices what others miss. Attention and the night watch — observability and code review.

packs.name: posy
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A flower-bud sprite just starting to open up. Fresh starts, good mornings, beginnings — and onboarding.

packs.name: pleat
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A soup dumpling, fresh out and ready to serve. Freshness, good timing, hot-off-the-line — and new releases.

packs.name: wick
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A tall lamplighter who keeps the lights on. Watch-keeping, lighting the way, warmth in the dark — and on-call and uptime.

packs.name: spritz
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A round watering can that helps things grow. Nurture, fresh starts, a little care daily — provisioning and onboarding.

packs.name: whorl
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A soft snail that keeps a copy of everything. Memory, carrying your history, never losing what matters — backups and snapshots.
